visa_types.name: Tourist visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original Passport (valid for a minimum period of six months at the time of submission of visa application)
- Copy of Passport
- Two recent Passport size photographs with white background
- Duly completed Online Application Form - https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/indianVisaReg.jsp (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/indianVisaReg.jsp)
- Applicable Visa Fee
- National ID copy/ Iqama copy
- National address printout
- Proof of confirmation of hotel accommodation in India
- Confirmed ticket
- A letter from Employer/Sponsor (chamber attested if applying in Jeddah jurisdiction) or 3 months bank statement. In case f minors, documents from either parents may be submitted
- Valid exit - entry copy for non-Saudi
- Letter from the Consulate/ Embassy for Sudanese and Yemeni nationals
visa_types.visa_fees:
The fee depends upon the type applied for and its duration. Visa fee is divided into various types depending upon the case viz; basic fee, special fee & processing fee charged by VFS Global. During the online registration, at the end of the process the basic fee shall be displayed. However, this fee shall be indicative only and final fee shall be charged while submitting the application at the Visa application centre.
To know more about the indicative visa fees applicable to you based on your category and duration, please proceed to online registration (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/index.html).
Tourist visa fee for Saudi nationals, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4pDzewnhrd3JsCdB722i1n/467ef4524202bf5584bdd4da278d4782/tourist-fee.pdf).
visa_types.processing_time:
Riyadh: 05 working days though some cases may take longer.
                            
Jeddah: 05 working days though.some cases may take longer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
In accordance with the rules and regulations of the Government of India, the Embassy grants visa, on application,
                              to those intending to visit India for tourist purposes.
The period of validity of the visa begins from the date of issue of visa. The Embassy reserves the right to refuse
                              visa without assigning any reason. Visa fee is charged regardless of whether visa is issued or not.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
In accordance with the rules and regulations of the Government of India, the Embassy grants visa, on application,
                              to those intending to visit India for tourist purposes.
The period of validity of the visa begins from the date of issue of visa. The Embassy reserves the right to refuse
                              visa without assigning any reason. Visa fee is charged regardless of whether visa is issued or not.

## Visa Fees
The fee depends upon the type applied for and its duration. Visa fee is divided into various types depending upon the case viz; basic fee, special fee & processing fee charged by VFS Global. During the online registration, at the end of the process the basic fee shall be displayed. However, this fee shall be indicative only and final fee shall be charged while submitting the application at the Visa application centre.
To know more about the indicative visa fees applicable to you based on your category and duration, please proceed to online registration (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/index.html).
Tourist visa fee for Saudi nationals, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4pDzewnhrd3JsCdB722i1n/467ef4524202bf5584bdd4da278d4782/tourist-fee.pdf).

## Documents Required
- Original Passport (valid for a minimum period of six months at the time of submission of visa application)
- Copy of Passport
- Two recent Passport size photographs with white background
- Duly completed Online Application Form - https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/indianVisaReg.jsp (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/indianVisaReg.jsp)
- Applicable Visa Fee
- National ID copy/ Iqama copy
- National address printout
- Proof of confirmation of hotel accommodation in India
- Confirmed ticket
- A letter from Employer/Sponsor (chamber attested if applying in Jeddah jurisdiction) or 3 months bank statement. In case f minors, documents from either parents may be submitted
- Valid exit - entry copy for non-Saudi
- Letter from the Consulate/ Embassy for Sudanese and Yemeni nationals

## Photo Specifications
Photo Specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1UVuYwIkvjHdii1qMFf906/ebc13df72253d80cd9cd7ada1b872d9e/Photo-specification.pdf)

## Processing Time
Riyadh: 05 working days though some cases may take longer.
                            
Jeddah: 05 working days though.some cases may take longer.
                    

## Download Form
Visa Online Application: https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/indianvisareg.jsp (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/)

visa_types.name: Business Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original Passport (valid for a minimum period of six months at the time of submission of visa application with two blank pages)
- Copy of Passport
- Two recent Passport size photographs
- Duly completed Online Application Form
- Applicable Visa Fee
- National ID copy/ Iqama copy
- National address printout
- To and from confirmed tickets
- A letter of request from a business establishment in Saudi Arabia attested by the Chamber
- A letter of invitation from business establishment in India
- Valid exit - entry copy for non-Saudi
- Letter from the Consulate/ Embassy for Sudanese and Yemeni nationals

visa_types.overview:
Overview
In accordance with the rules and regulations of the Government of India, the Embassy grants visa, on application,
                              to those intending to visit India for different Business purposes.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
In accordance with the rules and regulations of the Government of India, the Embassy grants visa, on application,
                              to those intending to visit India for different Business purposes.

## Visa Fees
The fee depends upon the type applied for and its duration. Visa fee is divided into various types depending upon the case viz; basic fee, special fee & processing fee charged by VFS Global. During the online registration, at the end of the process the basic fee shall be displayed. However, this fee shall be indicative only and final fee shall be charged while submitting the application at the Visa application centre.
To know more about the indicative visa fees applicable to you based on your category and duration, please proceed to online registration (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/index.html).
Business visa fee for Saudi nationals, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5RPvcVAcpGGzkoyIAeTeYl/0529c1a5bcb878244631de4004fb4e72/business-fee.pdf). 

## Documents Required
- Original Passport (valid for a minimum period of six months at the time of submission of visa application with two blank pages)
- Copy of Passport
- Two recent Passport size photographs
- Duly completed Online Application Form
- Applicable Visa Fee
- National ID copy/ Iqama copy
- National address printout
- To and from confirmed tickets
- A letter of request from a business establishment in Saudi Arabia attested by the Chamber
- A letter of invitation from business establishment in India
- Valid exit - entry copy for non-Saudi
- Letter from the Consulate/ Embassy for Sudanese and Yemeni nationals

## Photo Specifications
Photo Specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1UVuYwIkvjHdii1qMFf906/ebc13df72253d80cd9cd7ada1b872d9e/Photo-specification.pdf)

## Processing Time
Riyadh: 05 working days though some cases may take longer.
Jeddah: 05 working days though.some cases may take longer

visa_types.name: Conference/ Seminar Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Duly filled online application form
- Original Passport (valid for a minimum period of six months at the time of submission of with two blank pages)
- Two recent passport size photographs
- Copy of Passport
- Saudi ID card copy/ Iqama copy
- National address printout
- To and fro confirmed tickets
- Invitation letter from sponsor to attend the conference/ seminar
- Political clearance of the event issued by the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA)
- Security clearance of the event issued by the Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA)
- Letter from the Consulate/ Embassy for Sudanese and Yemeni nationals
- Applicable Visa Fee

visa_types.name: Employment Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Two recent Passport size photographs.
- Duly completed Online Application Form
- Original Passport (valid for a minimum period of six months at the time of submission of visa application with two blank pages)
- Copy of Passport
- Applicable Visa fee
- A copy of the contract signed with the employer in India or a letter regarding the offer of appointment in
                                India.
- A letter from company/ sponsor reg. requirement like payment of tax liabilities
- Documentary proof of educational qualifications and professional expertise
- Gross salary in excess of INR 16.25 lakhs per annum
- Applicant to be present in person
- Saudi ID copy/ Iqama copy
- National address printout
- To and fro confirmed tickets
- Valid exit - entry copy for non-Saudi
- Letter from the Consulate/ Embassy for Sudanese and Yemeni nationals

The fee depends upon the type applied for and its duration. Visa fee is divided into various types depending upon the case viz; basic fee, special fee & processing fee charged by VFS Global. During the online registration, at the end of the process the basic fee shall be displayed. However, this fee shall be indicative only and final fee shall be charged while submitting the application at the Visa application centre.
To know more about the indicative visa fees applicable to you based on your category and duration, please proceed to online registration (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/index.html).
Employment visa fee for Saudi nationals, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1BnLKOzUIWGyWHU7n9vDm9/d5c1b9099a553343a659950c77e37e39/employment-fee.pdf).

visa_types.name: Student Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original Passport (valid for a minimum period of six months at the time of submission of visa application with two blank pages)
- Passport Copy
- Two recent Passport size photographs. Please See Photograph Requirements Document)
- Duly completed Online Application Form
- Applicable Visa Fee
- Provisional admission letter in original along with a copy from a recognized educational institution in India.
- Travellers Cheque or DD for INR 50,000/-
- A letter of financial support from parent / guardian along with a bank guarantee worth SR.7,000 (Saudi Riyals
                                Seven Thousand) for the duration of the course/study.
- Father's employment letter indicating position held and salary attested by Chamber of Commerce/foreign Ministry.
- National ID copy/ Iqama copy
- National address printout
- Confirmed ticket
- Valid exit - entry copy for non-Saudi
- Letter from the Consulate/ Embassy for Sudanese and Yemeni nationals
Note:These papers are put up to Attaché (visa) -SS (C)-CC and visa is issued after Approval only. Provisional
                                student visa is for a period of 6 months with single entry.
Existing Students:
- Visa application form
- Visa appendix form
- Two photographs
- Copy of valid bank guarantee
- Bonafide certificate from the college/university in original
- Undertaking from father
- Traveler’s cheque worth USD 2000 in the name of the applicant payable in India.
visa_types.visa_fees:
The fee depends upon the type applied for and its duration. Visa fee is divided into various types depending upon the case viz; basic fee, special fee & processing fee charged by VFS Global. During the online registration, at the end of the process the basic fee shall be displayed. However, this fee shall be indicative only and final fee shall be charged while submitting the application at the Visa application centre.
To know more about the indicative visa fees applicable to you based on your category and duration, please proceed to online registration (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/index.html). 
Student Visa fees for Saudi nationals, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/27C5BxGLy4Vc2r4z7DpZCX/6fa63875f004b5742e5d5c9b939ef938/student-fee.pdf).
visa_types.processing_time:
Riyadh: 05 working days though some cases may take longer.
Jeddah: 05 working days though.some cases may take longer.

visa_types.name: Medical Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Duly filled online 
- application form
- Original Passport (valid for a minimum period of six months at the time of submission with two blank pages)
- Applicable Visa fee
- Two recent passport size photographs
- Copy of Passport
- Saudi ID card copy/ Iqama copy
- National address printout
- To and fro confirmed tickets
- Printout of visa invitation letter from hospital in India/ valid medical document of previous treatment if visited on a medical visa previously
- Medical Reports / Hospital References in case of medical treatment in Saudi Arabia
- Indian hospital to send the visa invitation letter separately from official email ID to the Consulate General of India in Jeddah. i.e.
visa.jeddah@mea.gov.in (mailto:visa.jeddah@mea.gov.in)
(applicable if applying in Jeddah jurisdiction)
- Valid exit - entry copy for non-Saudi
- Letter from the Consulate/ Embassy for Sudanese and Yemeni nationals

visa_types.name: Visa For Pakistan Nationals / Pakistan Origin Foreign Nationals
visa_types.documents_required:
- All       applications of Pakistan nationals and Pakistan Origin are accepted after       prior approval from the consulate.
- Pakistan       nationals are issued visas to see their close blood relatives, Medical       treatment and business purposes.
- Pakistan       nationals visiting close relatives, for business, and Medical Visa, same       conditions as in the case of other nationals (but visa applied on       Pakistani Visa form in quadruplet)have to submit 4 visa applications (Pakistan       )
- Visa       appendix form
- Iqama       copy
- Affidavit       from close relative in India.
- Foreign Nationals of Pakistan origin have to apply visa on Pakistani passport  only

visa_types.overview:
Overview
In accordance with the rules and regulations of the Government of India, the Embassy grants visa, on application, to those intending to visit India for tourist, business and other purposes
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
In accordance with the rules and regulations of the Government of India, the Embassy grants visa, on application, to those intending to visit India for tourist, business and other purposes

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Visa For Pakistan Nationals / Pakistan Origin Foreign Nationals]

## Documents Required
- All       applications of Pakistan nationals and Pakistan Origin are accepted after       prior approval from the consulate.
- Pakistan       nationals are issued visas to see their close blood relatives, Medical       treatment and business purposes.
- Pakistan       nationals visiting close relatives, for business, and Medical Visa, same       conditions as in the case of other nationals (but visa applied on       Pakistani Visa form in quadruplet)have to submit 4 visa applications (Pakistan       )
- Visa       appendix form
- Iqama       copy
- Affidavit       from close relative in India.
- Foreign Nationals of Pakistan origin have to apply visa on Pakistani passport  only

## Photo Specifications
Photo Specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1UVuYwIkvjHdii1qMFf906/ebc13df72253d80cd9cd7ada1b872d9e/Photo-specification.pdf)

## Processing Time
Riyadh: Subject to approval
Jeddah: Subject to approval
                             

## Download Form
Visa Online Application:  https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/indianvisareg.jsp (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/)

visa_types.name: Entry Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Duly completed Online Application Form
- Original Passport (valid for a minimum period of six months at the time of submission of visa application with two blank pages)
- Two recent passport size photographs
- Applicable visa fee
- Copy of Passport
- National ID copy/ Iqama copy
- To and fro confirmed tickets
- Letter of employment
- Persons of Indian origin should attach a copy of previous Indian passport/ OCI card/ PIO card/ Marriage certificate/ Birth certificate with translation (if not in English language) etc., as a proof of his/ her Indian connection
- Spouses of Indian national or of Indian origin, legalized/ apostilled marriage certificate is required
- In case of minor having foreign passport, copies of both parents are required.
- Valid exit - entry copy for non-Saudi
- Letter from the Consulate/ Embassy for Sudanese and Yemeni nationals
visa_types.visa_fees:
The fee depends upon the type applied for and its duration. Visa fee is divided into various types depending upon the case viz; basic fee, special fee & processing fee charged by VFS Global. During the online registration, at the end of the process the basic fee shall be displayed. However, this fee shall be indicative only and final fee shall be charged while submitting the application at the Visa application centre.
To know more about the indicative visa fees applicable to you based on your category and duration, please proceed to online registration (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/index.html).
Entry Visa fee for Saudi nationals, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1PyUrV5i4ho4dIkdCMx05p/ff9ceac8f092079516525e4d8961c57d/entry-fee.pdf).
visa_types.processing_time: Visas are normally issued on the 2nd working day (Riyadh only) or as per the date given in the printed acknowledgement receipt.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
In accordance with the rules and regulations of the Government of India, the Embassy grants visa, on application, to those intending to visit India for different purposes.
Entry visa is issued to wives/husbands/children of persons of Indian origin. This is issued for the purpose of meeting relatives in India.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
In accordance with the rules and regulations of the Government of India, the Embassy grants visa, on application, to those intending to visit India for different purposes.
Entry visa is issued to wives/husbands/children of persons of Indian origin. This is issued for the purpose of meeting relatives in India. 

## Visa Fees
The fee depends upon the type applied for and its duration. Visa fee is divided into various types depending upon the case viz; basic fee, special fee & processing fee charged by VFS Global. During the online registration, at the end of the process the basic fee shall be displayed. However, this fee shall be indicative only and final fee shall be charged while submitting the application at the Visa application centre.
To know more about the indicative visa fees applicable to you based on your category and duration, please proceed to online registration (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/index.html).
Entry Visa fee for Saudi nationals, please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1PyUrV5i4ho4dIkdCMx05p/ff9ceac8f092079516525e4d8961c57d/entry-fee.pdf). 

## Documents Required
- Duly completed Online Application Form
- Original Passport (valid for a minimum period of six months at the time of submission of visa application with two blank pages)
- Two recent passport size photographs
- Applicable visa fee
- Copy of Passport
- National ID copy/ Iqama copy
- To and fro confirmed tickets
- Letter of employment
- Persons of Indian origin should attach a copy of previous Indian passport/ OCI card/ PIO card/ Marriage certificate/ Birth certificate with translation (if not in English language) etc., as a proof of his/ her Indian connection
- Spouses of Indian national or of Indian origin, legalized/ apostilled marriage certificate is required
- In case of minor having foreign passport, copies of both parents are required.
- Valid exit - entry copy for non-Saudi
- Letter from the Consulate/ Embassy for Sudanese and Yemeni nationals

## Photo Specifications
Photo Specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1UVuYwIkvjHdii1qMFf906/ebc13df72253d80cd9cd7ada1b872d9e/Photo-specification.pdf)

## Processing Time
Visas are normally issued on the 2nd working day (Riyadh only) or as per the date given in the printed acknowledgement receipt.

## Download Form
Visa Online Application:  https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/indianvisareg.jsp (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/)
